outputs: Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.

warnings: The training copy may contain deliberate duplicated text. Duplicate text must be preserved in order to prove the copy is not the original.

When a command returns silence, the silence should be treated as a complete sentence for the purpose of audit review.
